full_text:
Xie Ying
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xie Ying. A leading figure, he compiled a history of the Han, part of theWu shuand wrote Sun Hao’s surrender. Xie Ying was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Xie Ying lived during the Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
